servinfo.title: Inspection of Keyless Start Control Module and Its Circuits

servinfosub.title: Voltage and Signal Check
servinfosub.ptxt: Check voltage and/or pulse signal of keyless start control module (3) using voltmeter (1) and oscilloscope (2).

item.ptxt: Confirm that battery voltage is 12 V or more.
Voltage of terminal with asterisk (*) cannot be measured by voltmeter because it is pulse signal. Check it with oscilloscope if necessary.

entry.ptxt: Power supply for starting motor control relay
Power supply for steering lock unit
Ground for keyless start control module
Refer to Mid inside antenna signal .
Refer to Rear inside antenna signal .
Refer to Rear outside antenna signal .
Refer to Driver side outside antenna signal and passenger side outside antenna signal .
Refer to Driver side outside antenna signal and passenger side outside antenna signal .
Refer to Door lock switch signal, rear end door switch signal, door switch signal and P position switch signal .
Refer to Keyless entry receiver signal .
Refer to Door key cylinder switch signal and rear end door opener switch signal .
Refer to Door lock switch signal, rear end door switch signal, door switch signal and P position switch signal .
Refer to Door lock switch signal, rear end door switch signal, door switch signal and P position switch signal .
Refer to Door lock switch signal, rear end door switch signal, door switch signal and P position switch signal .
Refer to Door key cylinder switch signal and rear end door opener switch signal .
Refer to Mid inside antenna signal .
Refer to Rear inside antenna signal .
Refer to Rear outside antenna signal .
Refer to Driver side outside antenna signal and passenger side outside antenna signal .
Refer to Driver side outside antenna signal and passenger side outside antenna signal .
Refer to Door lock switch signal, rear end door switch signal, door switch signal and P position switch signal .
Rear end door request switch signal
Rear end door request switch: Pushed
Power supply for keyless entry receiver
Refer to Keyless entry receiver signal .
Refer to Door lock switch signal, rear end door switch signal, door switch signal and P position switch signal .
Refer to Door lock switch signal, rear end door switch signal, door switch signal and P position switch signal .
Refer to Door lock switch signal, rear end door switch signal, door switch signal and P position switch signal .
Ground for keyless start control module
Refer to Door key cylinder switch signal and rear end door opener switch signal .

topic.title: Oscilloscope display
topic.ptxt: Shown below is typical waveform display provided by oscilloscope.

item.ptxt: How to read waveforms is shown below.
Waveforms may vary with measurement conditions and vehicle specifications.
Any one of doors: Open → Close
Any one of doors: Open → Close
Remote controller: Within rear outside antenna detection range
Rear end door request switch: ON

topic.title: Driver side outside antenna signal and passenger side outside antenna signal

item.ptxt: Remote controller: Within driver side outside antenna detection range
Remote controller: Within passenger side outside antenna detection range

topic.title: Door lock switch signal, rear end door switch signal, door switch signal and P position switch signal

table.title: Power supply for keyless entry receiver (1):

item.ptxt: Remote controller: Any one of the buttons is pushed

topic.title: Door key cylinder switch signal and rear end door opener switch signal

table.title: Rear end door opener switch signal:

item.ptxt: Rear end door opener switch: Released
